'''Stewed gwouch''' was a kind of food. Young [[Klaus Vandangante/Legends|Klaus Vandangante]] found it rather unpalatable.<ref name="Han Solo" /> Despite its flavor, it was highly nutritious.<ref name="swg">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=item|Stewed Gwouch}}</ref>
